name: Cabbage-Sausage-Beef Goulash
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the pork sausage, ground beef, and chopped onion in a large pot until well drained.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (tomatoes, tomato paste, vinegar, chili powder, garlic powder, and red pepper flakes) to the pot and mix thoroughly.
3. Stir in the shredded cabbage and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the cabbage is tender.
